exemplar.title: 21-what is the relationship between knowledge and culture

detailedExemplarData.title: 21-what is the relationship between knowledge and culture

strengths: Clear, well-presented title and opening paragraph that frame the chosen IA prompt effectively
Identification of three distinct real-world objects with basic contextual information
Use of headings to organize the exhibition and a bibliography showing effort to support academic integrity
weaknesses: Commentary is largely descriptive and repeats historical or cultural facts without explicit TOK analysis
Links to the prompt (ârelationship between knowledge and cultureâ) are stated but remain superficial and lack TOK terminology (e.g., shared vs. personal knowledge, ways of knowing)
Images and contexts are sometimes generic rather than showing the studentâs own artefacts or precise instances
Some factual inaccuracies (e.g., misstatement about French rule in Egypt) and inconsistent citation formatting
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The examinerâs strand assessment places this work in the 3â4 band: the student has clearly identified three objects and their contexts and made some links to the prompt, but the explanation is unfocused, descriptive and only partly supported by evidence. Given the overall level of performanceâsolid presentation but limited TOK analysisâthe award of 3 marks out of 10 accurately reflects the workâs placement at the lower boundary of the band. This distribution ensures the final score matches the examinerâs total while recognizing the relative strengths and areas needing development.

annotations.comment: The title is clearly presented, giving a strong first impression and orienting the reader to the TOK exhibition.
Consider rephrasing the prompt with consistent capitalization and punctuation (e.g., âWhat Is the Relationship Between Knowledge and Culture?â) to reflect academic register.
This opening paragraph provides clear context and frames the IA prompt effectively, demonstrating a sound understanding of the exhibitionâs purpose.
The write-up on the treeâs symbolism is repetitive of earlier descriptions; consider condensing to avoid redundancy and sharpen analysis.
This photograph should depict the actual Central Park installation to ground the exhibition in a precise real-world context.
How might visitorsâ firsthand experiences of the tree inform our understanding of shared cultural knowledge?
The bibliography demonstrates effort to include sources, which supports academic integrity.
Ensure that this source is cited in the text where facts about the Rosetta Stone appear to strengthen evidence alignment.
The credibility of âSuper Userâ as a scholarly source is questionable; consider replacing with a peer-reviewed or institutional site.
Clarify the relevance of the film adaptation article to Native American dreamcatchers or remove if not directly supporting analysis.
To deepen TOK focus, explicitly reference TOK concepts (e.g., âperspectives,â âshared knowledgeâ) when describing how culture shapes understanding.
Good clear heading for Object 1, establishing the Rosetta Stone as the first artefact under analysis.
The commentary on the Rosetta Stone is largely descriptive and lacks explicit analysis of how knowledge is produced or interpreted within Egyptian culture.
The statement that âEgypt was under the reign of Franceâ in 1799 is historically inaccurate; France never fully ruled Egypt as a colony.
Consider linking specific features of the stone (e.g., trilingual text) to the prompt by explaining how multilingual records enhance cultural knowledge exchange.
The concluding claim ties the stone to knowledge and culture, but would benefit from a precise TOK distinction such as between shared and personal knowledge.
This sentence acknowledges the Rosetta Stone as a bridge between civilizations, highlighting its significance in knowledge transmission.
The image should be of the actual Rosetta Stone in the British Museum to reinforce real-world context rather than a generic depiction.
Label âObject 2: MY DREAMCATCHERâ is clear, indicating a personal artefact linked to cultural practice.
The description of dreamcatcher origins is detailed but lacks an explicit link to the IA prompt; make clear how its symbolism shows culture shaping knowledge.
How does the makerâs technical knowledge of crafting a dreamcatcher illustrate the transmission of cultural knowledge across generations?
Consider using a photograph of the studentâs actual dreamcatcher to underscore its real-world context rather than a stock image.
The discussion of protection and environmental respect is informative but leans toward description; shift to analysis of knowledge creation and preservation.
Strong label for Object 3, clearly identifying the Central Park Christmas tree as the final artefact.
The description of the Christmas tree is vivid but generic; specify its link to Rockefeller Center or Central Park to ground the real-world context.
What is meant by a âmulti-dimensional approach to knowledgeâ in TOK terms? Clarify with reference to specific ways or areas of knowledge.
The mention of family gatherings and festive ambiance is relevant but would be stronger if linked to how communal celebrations transmit cultural knowledge.
Provide access dates and consistent formatting (e.g., author, date, title) for web citations to meet academic standards.
The last web citationâs title formatting is inconsistent; apply a uniform citation style throughout for professionalism.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of

than of specific

between the objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
